name: Special City Council Closed Session
summary: Laguna Beach City Council is holding a special closed-session meeting on June 11, 2026, mainly to discuss labor negotiations with city employee associations, multiple real estate negotiations, and potential litigation related to a First Amendment challenge to a city ordinance. No general public business is scheduled beyond these closed-session items, and the meeting will adjourn to the next regular council meeting on June 23, 2026.

name: Design Review Board
summary: The Planning Commission agenda appears to cover a routine set of land-use and development items, likely including project reviews, permits, and zoning-related decisions. It suggests the commission will evaluate proposals and determine whether they meet city planning standards before moving forward.
